title: medicago littoralis subsp. cylindracea
intro: Medicago littoralis subsp. cylindracea, also known as Narrow-leaved Medicago, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Medicago littoralis subsp. cylindracea include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
